context: Tests whether the skill identifies and corrects all 18 specific AI writing anti-patterns seeded throughout the draft. Each criterion checks that a particular named anti-pattern was detected and removed or rewritten while preserving factual content.

checklist.name: Contrastive negation fixed
checklist.description: The 'Not a branching strategy. A survival mechanism.' and 'Not just a workflow. A philosophy.' patterns are rewritten as direct statements instead of 'Not X. Y.' pairs

checklist.name: Parallel binary comparisons fixed
checklist.description: The 'Where feature branches give you isolation, trunk-based gives you speed' mirrored clauses are rewritten without structural parallelism

checklist.name: Asyndetic tricolon fixed
checklist.description: The 'Fast. Reliable. Tested. And shipped on a Monday.' three-fragments-plus-kicker pattern is rewritten as actual sentences

checklist.name: Choppy fragments fixed
checklist.description: The 'Feature flags. Dark launches. Percentage rollouts. Pure control.' fragment chain is rewritten as sentences with verbs and meaning

checklist.name: Symmetrical LLM patterns fixed
checklist.description: The 'The code doesn't define the process; the process defines the code' fortune-cookie balanced clause is rewritten as a direct point

checklist.name: Self-answering fragments fixed
checklist.description: The 'The result? Everyone could deploy. The best part? It just worked.' noun-phrase-question-then-answer patterns are rewritten without fake rhetorical tension

checklist.name: Parenthetical em-dashes fixed
checklist.description: The 'The pipeline -- which we had built over three sprints -- handled it gracefully' paired-em-dash aside is rewritten using commas or parentheses

checklist.name: Excessive em-dashes reduced
checklist.description: The section with 4 paired em-dashes is rewritten to have no more than 2 em-dashes per section

checklist.name: Preamble removed
checklist.description: 'In this post, we'll explore' and 'What follows is a deep dive into' are removed or rewritten as direct narrative

checklist.name: Hedging removed
checklist.description: 'It's worth noting that', 'Interestingly enough', 'It bears mentioning', 'To be fair' are deleted or the point is stated directly

checklist.name: Emojis removed
checklist.description: The cleaned output contains zero emoji characters (the rocket, fire, and party popper from the original are all removed)

checklist.name: AI vocabulary cleaned
checklist.description: Words from the contamination list are removed or replaced with plain alternatives: 'leveraged', 'streamlined', 'robust', 'delved', 'fostered', 'seamless', 'pivotal', 'transformative', 'landscape', 'navigate', 'groundbreaking', 'showcased', 'vital', 'intricacies', 'ecosystem'

checklist.name: Copula avoidance fixed
checklist.description: 'served as the backbone', 'stood as a testament', 'boasted real-time alerting', 'showcased zero-downtime releases' are replaced with simpler verbs like 'is', 'was', 'has', 'had'

checklist.name: Low burstiness improved
checklist.description: The paragraph where every sentence starts with 'We' and is 8-10 words long is rewritten with varied sentence lengths (mix of short, medium, and long)

checklist.name: Fabricated experience removed
checklist.description: 'What I find genuinely interesting', 'I keep coming back to the idea that', 'Something feels off', and 'Picture the workflow: you sit down at your desk' are rewritten as direct claims without simulated personal experience

checklist.name: False ranges fixed
checklist.description: 'From solo developers to hundred-person engineering orgs' and 'Whether you're building a side project or a Fortune 500 deployment' false-inclusivity ranges are replaced with specific audience targeting

checklist.name: Synonym cycling fixed
checklist.description: The cycling of 'the CI pipeline' / 'the integration system' / 'the build infrastructure' / 'the automation layer' referring to the same thing is replaced with consistent terminology

checklist.name: Unicode giveaways fixed
checklist.description: Curly quotes, horizontal ellipsis, en dashes, and emoji in the source text are replaced with plain ASCII equivalents

checklist.name: Factual claims preserved
checklist.description: All factual claims are preserved: zero rollbacks, 99.9% uptime, 200 tests, Google using it for a decade, three-month transition, 10-15 deploys per day

checklist.name: Anti-pattern count reported
checklist.description: The output summary reports the count of AI anti-patterns detected and remediated
